Turtle-eggs may be found at the turtle nesting-grounds to the south-east of the Woodman camp in the Rushgore. Frogildi has asked you to collect the tu…
Frogildi is at the Woodman camp in the Rushgore, north-west of the turtle nesting-grounds. You should speak with Frogildi regarding the eggs.
